message:
feat(reservations): improve path handling, validation, and force-release logic

Reservation path handling:
- Add expand_tilde() and normalize_repo_path() helpers to support tilde
  paths and relative paths in code_repo_path arguments
- install_precommit_guard now respects Config::worktrees_enabled, returning
  a no-op when worktrees are disabled
- uninstall_precommit_guard uses normalize_repo_path instead of requiring
  absolute paths

Validation improvements:
- file_reservation_paths now rejects empty paths list with a descriptive
  error message including usage examples
- TTL below 60s now logs an info warning instead of hard-erroring, allowing
  short-lived reservations while flagging the unusual configuration

Force-release improvements:
- force_release_file_reservation is now async and actually resolves the
  project/agent/reservation from the database instead of returning stubs
- Returns proper "already_released" status when the reservation was
  previously released, with the original release timestamp
- Errors with a clear message when the reservation ID is not found

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
